Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets analyze the event log Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The main flow is RA VF AE AD SC AC In the middle theres an optional loop for Request Missing Info RMI and re validate form VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Trace 1 RMI VF matches and Trace 2 has no middle part and Trace 3 has RMI RMI VF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait looking at Trace 3 AE is followed by RMI RMI VF This does not match tau then RMI VF repeated because that would require VF between the RMIs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So after AE theres a loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Maybe the loop is just on RMI So RA VF AE loop tau RMI then VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Trace 2 has no second VF after AE so VF after AE only occurs if RMI occurs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means the re validation VF is part of the loop or at least dependent on the missing info phase

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: The loop tau then RMI VF repeated still does not match Trace 3 because it gives RMI VF RMI VF not RMI RMI VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What if the middle part is sequence of zero or more RMIs followed by optional VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The middle part sequence loop tau RMI then xor tau VF gives Trace 1 as RMI VF Trace 2 as empty and Trace 3 as RMI RMI VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This tree does not allow VF RMI and it keeps all RMIs before VF which is closer to the log

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: It perfectly balances fitness precision and simplicity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: It captures the main flow the optional repeating loop for missing information the re validation and the eventual approval
